# Decision Scorecard

*If a PR cannot answer these five questions, it probably shouldn't exist. This template enforces the Business Priority Rule.*

### What business decision became easier?
[Fact/Observation]

### How much faster?
[Observation]

### What evidence proves that?
[Fact - link to tests, logs, or metrics]

### What permanent maintenance cost was introduced?
[Assessment]

### Was an existing abstraction reused first?
[Fact]
